evals.prompt: standard: add rate limiting middleware to the API
evals.expected_output: Standard tier produces spec-lite, plan, execution report, and change record in STANDARD_rate-limiting/ directory.
expectations: A spec-lite section is generated containing a problem statement
A spec-lite section is generated containing requirements
A plan file named STANDARD_rate-limiting.md or similar STANDARD_<name>.md is created in the plans directory
A STANDARD_REPORT.json file is created with reportType set to standard
A CHANGE_RECORD.json envelope is generated with tier set to standard
The plan file contains numbered tasks for execution

evals.prompt: standard: add form validation to the user registration page
evals.expected_output: Standard tier generates all three artifacts with correct structure and content.
expectations: A STANDARD_<name>.md plan file is created in the plans directory
The plan file includes a spec-lite section with problem statement and requirements
A STANDARD_REPORT.json is created with correct structure including implementedFeatures
A CHANGE_RECORD.json is created with tier field set to standard
Pattern documentation is loaded and referenced during spec-lite generation

evals.prompt: standard: add caching layer to database queries for improved performance
evals.expected_output: Standard tier handles a medium-complexity data layer change with appropriate ceremony.
expectations: The spec-lite section identifies architectural considerations for the caching layer
A STANDARD_<name>.md plan is written with tasks covering cache implementation
A STANDARD_REPORT.json is generated after execution
A CHANGE_RECORD.json envelope is generated with tier set to standard
A review-lite verdict is present in the output

evals.prompt: standard: update Stripe webhook handler to support new event types
evals.expected_output: Standard tier correctly handles a payment-domain change with spec-lite, plan, and all artifacts.
expectations: The spec-lite section identifies the payment domain sensitivity
A STANDARD_<name>.md plan file is created
A STANDARD_REPORT.json is created with reportType set to standard
A CHANGE_RECORD.json is created with tier set to standard
The review-lite checks for payment-related concerns

evals.prompt: standard: add error toast notification component to the dashboard
evals.expected_output: Standard tier produces all required artifacts for a UI component addition.
expectations: A spec-lite section is generated with problem statement and requirements for the toast component
A STANDARD_<name>.md plan file is created in the plans directory
A STANDARD_REPORT.json is created with correct reportType
A CHANGE_RECORD.json envelope is generated with tier set to standard
All three artifact files are located in the same STANDARD_<name>/ subdirectory under the plans directory

evals.prompt: standard: refactor the user service to use repository pattern
evals.expected_output: Standard tier handles an architectural refactoring with appropriate spec-lite analysis.
expectations: The spec-lite section identifies the repository pattern as an architectural change
A STANDARD_<name>.md plan is generated with structured tasks
A STANDARD_REPORT.json is created after execution completes
A CHANGE_RECORD.json is created with tier set to standard
The plan references existing code patterns from pattern documentation

evals.prompt: standard mode: add pagination to the product listing API endpoint
evals.expected_output: Standard tier handles an API enhancement with all required artifacts and review.
expectations: The skill triggers correctly from the standard mode prompt
A spec-lite section is generated covering pagination requirements
A STANDARD_<name>.md plan file is created
A STANDARD_REPORT.json and CHANGE_RECORD.json are both generated
A review-lite step is performed before producing the change record
